inputs.body:
// ================================================================
// AUTHGUARD PRO MASTER DETECTION QUERY
// Combines all 7 threat types into one unified output
// This is what the Logic App runs every 5 minutes
// ================================================================
let timeWindow = 24h;
let bfThreshold = 5;
let sprayThreshold = 3;
let stuffThreshold = 3;
// --- Brute Force ---
let bf = FailedLogins_CL
| where TimeGenerated > ago(timeWindow)
| summarize FC=count(), IPs=make_set(SourceIPAddress_s,5)
  by UserPrincipalName_s, SourceIPAddress_s, Country_s
| where FC >= bfThreshold
| project ThreatType="Brute Force",
    AffectedEntity=UserPrincipalName_s,
    AttackerIP=SourceIPAddress_s,
    FailureCount=FC,
    Details=strcat("IP: ",SourceIPAddress_s," (",Country_s,") → ",tostring(FC)," attempts");
// --- Password Spray ---
let ps = FailedLogins_CL
| where TimeGenerated > ago(timeWindow)
| summarize Users=dcount(UserPrincipalName_s),
    UL=make_set(UserPrincipalName_s,10), FC=count()
  by SourceIPAddress_s, Country_s
| where Users >= sprayThreshold
| project ThreatType="Password Spray",
    AffectedEntity=SourceIPAddress_s,
    AttackerIP=SourceIPAddress_s,
    FailureCount=FC,
    Details=strcat(tostring(Users)," users targeted: ",tostring(UL));
// --- Credential Stuffing ---
let cs = FailedLogins_CL
| where TimeGenerated > ago(timeWindow)
| summarize DIPs=dcount(SourceIPAddress_s),
    IPL=make_set(SourceIPAddress_s,10), FC=count()
  by UserPrincipalName_s
| where DIPs >= stuffThreshold and FC >= bfThreshold
| project ThreatType="Credential Stuffing",
    AffectedEntity=UserPrincipalName_s,
    AttackerIP="Multiple",
    FailureCount=FC,
    Details=strcat(tostring(DIPs)," distinct IPs: ",tostring(IPL));
// --- Impossible Travel ---
let it = FailedLogins_CL
| where TimeGenerated > ago(1h)
| where AttackType_s == "ImpossibleTravel"
| summarize FC=count(),
    Cities=make_set(City_s,5), Countries=make_set(Country_s,5)
  by UserPrincipalName_s
| where FC >= 2
| project ThreatType="Impossible Travel",
    AffectedEntity=UserPrincipalName_s,
    AttackerIP="Multiple Locations",
    FailureCount=FC,
    Details=strcat("Cities: ",tostring(Cities)," Countries: ",tostring(Countries));
// --- Off-Hours ---
let oh = FailedLogins_CL
| where TimeGenerated > ago(1h)
| where LoginHour_d < 8 or LoginHour_d >= 19
| summarize FC=count(), Hours=make_set(LoginHour_d,5)
  by UserPrincipalName_s
| where FC >= 3
| project ThreatType="Off-Hours Anomaly",
    AffectedEntity=UserPrincipalName_s,
    AttackerIP="N/A",
    FailureCount=FC,
    Details=strcat("Login hours: ",tostring(Hours));
// --- Account Enumeration ---
let ae = FailedLogins_CL
| where TimeGenerated > ago(timeWindow)
| where FailureReason_s == "Invalid username"
| summarize Users=dcount(UserPrincipalName_s), FC=count()
  by SourceIPAddress_s
| where Users >= 3
| project ThreatType="Account Enumeration",
    AffectedEntity=SourceIPAddress_s,
    AttackerIP=SourceIPAddress_s,
    FailureCount=FC,
    Details=strcat(tostring(Users)," non-existent usernames tried");
// --- HVT ---
let hvt = FailedLogins_CL
| where TimeGenerated > ago(30m)
| where IsHighValueTarget_s == "True"
| summarize FC=count(), DIPs=dcount(SourceIPAddress_s),
    Types=make_set(AttackType_s,5)
  by UserPrincipalName_s
| where FC >= 3
| project ThreatType="High-Value Target",
    AffectedEntity=UserPrincipalName_s,
    AttackerIP="Multiple",
    FailureCount=FC,
    Details=strcat("Distinct IPs: ",tostring(DIPs)," Types: ",tostring(Types));
// === UNION ALL ===
bf | union ps | union cs | union it | union oh | union ae | union hvt
| extend Severity = case(
    FailureCount >= 15 or ThreatType == "Impossible Travel", "Critical",
    FailureCount >= 8, "High",
    "Medium")
| order by Severity asc, FailureCount desc

body.Subject: 🚨 AuthGuard Pro Alert — @{length(body('Run_query_and_list_results')?['value'])} Threat(s) Detected
body.Body:
🛡️ AuthGuard Pro — Security Alert

Detection Time@{convertTimeZone(utcNow(), 'UTC', 'India Standard Time', 'dd/MM/yyyy hh:mm:ss tt')} IST
Threats Found@{length(body('Run_query_and_list_results')?['value'])} pattern(s)
EnrichmentIP Reputation + Composite Risk Scoring applied
EngineAuthGuard Pro v2.0 | Team ShieldOps

⚡ Immediate Actions Required:

  1. Review affected accounts in Entra ID
  2. Check source IPs against threat intelligence
  3. Enable Conditional Access blocks for flagged IPs
  4. Escalate Critical-severity threats to IR team

This alert was generated by AuthGuard Pro — an automated identity threat detection engine built by Team ShieldOps for Hack2Future 2026.
